*->revive.guardText: reviveCount < REVIVE_BUDGET (1); 2nd failure escalates to stalled

*->stalled.guardText: reviveCount >= REVIVE_BUDGET — escalation to terminal failure sink

verify->remediate.guardText: deriveAdvancement: verify.json regression_risk > 0 and remediateCycleCount < REMEDIATE_CYCLE_CAP
verify->remediate.datalog: advance_to('remediate', T) :- phase_done('verify', T), regression_risk(T, R), R > 0, cycle_count(T, C), C < 3.

remediate->verify.guardText: deriveAdvancement: after remediate completes, advance back to verify

*->turn-cap.guardText: event.type === 'turn-cap-exhausted' — continuation self-loop, revive budget untouched
